system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft reconstruction planner. Output only one JSON object. No markdown. No prose outside JSON.
prompt:
You are given a building description JSON.
Create a high-fidelity executable build plan.

Use ONLY operation types:
- fill: axis-aligned cuboid fill
- carve: axis-aligned cuboid set to air
- set: single block placement

Before writing operations, infer a structured geometry spec.
Required output JSON schema:
{
  "plan_version": "v2_strong",
  "bbox": {"xmin": 0, "xmax": 0, "ymin": 0, "ymax": 0, "zmin": 0, "zmax": 0},
  "palette": {
    "wall": "stonebrick",
    "roof": "wood",
    "trim": "brick",
    "glass": "glass",
    "light": "glowstone",
    "floor": "wood"
  },
  "structure_spec": {
    "footprint_2d": {
      "type": "rectangle|l_shape|u_shape|complex",
      "segments": [{"x1": 0, "z1": 0, "x2": 0, "z2": 0, "label": "main"}],
      "symmetry": "string"
    },
    "floors": [
      {
        "floor_index": 0,
        "y_range": {"ymin": 0, "ymax": 0},
        "rooms_hint": "string",
        "perimeter_profile": "string"
      }
    ],
    "openings": [
      {"kind": "door|window", "face": "north|south|east|west|roof", "x1": 0, "y1": 0, "z1": 0, "x2": 0, "y2": 0, "z2": 0}
    ],
    "roof_profile": {
      "type": "flat|gable|hip|dome|other|unknown",
      "base_y": 0,
      "ridge_axis": "x|z|none",
      "layers": [{"y": 0, "x1": 0, "z1": 0, "x2": 0, "z2": 0, "block": "wood"}]
    }
  },
  "operations": [
    {"op": "fill", "x1": 0, "y1": 0, "z1": 0, "x2": 1, "y2": 1, "z2": 1, "block": "stonebrick", "purpose": "base"},
    {"op": "carve", "x1": 0, "y1": 0, "z1": 0, "x2": 0, "y2": 0, "z2": 0, "purpose": "hollow"},
    {"op": "set", "x": 0, "y": 0, "z": 0, "block": "glowstone", "purpose": "light"}
  ],
  "self_check": {
    "bbox_consistency": "ok|fix_needed",
    "operation_count": 0,
    "operation_count_ok": true,
    "material_ratio_notes": ["string"],
    "openings_present": true,
    "entrance_present": true,
    "issues": ["string"]
  },
  "notes": ["optional"]
}

Hard constraints:
- Coordinates must be integers.
- Keep bbox near origin; prefer non-negative coordinates.
- operations count <= 260.
- Building must include floor, walls, roof, windows, entrance.
- Use normalized material IDs where possible.
- Every operation must lie inside bbox.

Design quality rules:
- Prioritize global silhouette correctness first, then openings, then small details.
- Avoid fragmented micro-operations when one larger cuboid works.
- Keep openings aligned and symmetric when description indicates symmetry.
- If uncertain, choose coherent defaults and note uncertainty in notes/self_check. 

Reference examples (few-shot):
[Few-shot 1: compact_gable_house]
Description JSON:
{
  "building_type": "small house",
  "shape": {
    "footprint_hint": "rectangle",
    "floors_estimate": 1,
    "roof_type": "gable"
  },
  "dimensions_estimate": {
    "width": 10,
    "depth": 8,
    "height": 7
  },
  "materials": [
    {
      "name": "stonebrick",
      "role": "wall"
    },
    {
      "name": "wood",
      "role": "roof"
    },
    {
      "name": "glass",
      "role": "window"
    }
  ]
}

planner_system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft reconstruction planner. Output only one JSON object. No markdown. No prose outside JSON.
planner_prompt:
You are given a building description JSON.
Create a high-fidelity executable build plan.

Use ONLY operation types:
- fill: axis-aligned cuboid fill
- carve: axis-aligned cuboid set to air
- set: single block placement

Before writing operations, infer a structured geometry spec.
Required output JSON schema:

    "trim": "brick",
    "glass": "glass",
    "light": "glowstone",
    "floor": "wood"
  },
  "structure_spec": {
    "footprint_2d": {
      "type": "rectangle|l_shape|u_shape|complex",
      "segments": [{"x1": 0, "z1": 0, "x2": 0, "z2": 0, "label": "main"}],
      "symmetry": "string"
    },
    "floors": [
      {
        "floor_index": 0,
        "y_range": {"ymin": 0, "ymax": 0},

    {"op": "fill", "x1": 0, "y1": 0, "z1": 0, "x2": 1, "y2": 1, "z2": 1, "block": "stonebrick", "purpose": "base"},
